description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in smooth white plaster, accented by large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front entryway is defined by a covered porch with a dark gable roof supported by stone-clad columns, leading to a wooden deck. The house appears to be two stories tall, with the upper floor partially open to the outside, possibly as a balcony or terrace. Stone and wood elements add texture and warmth to the otherwise minimalist facade. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of large picture windows and smaller panes, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a covered entry porch supported by stone columns. The exterior combines white plaster, stone, and wood for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a gable-roofed porch, stone columns, and large windows on the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a single large window on the lower floor and a clear view into the open-plan upper story.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide expanse of wall with a large horizontal window and minimal exterior detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another large window on the lower floor and the continuation of the stone column and porch structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with gable roof, stone columns, wooden deck, and a single main door
